L

LoginController - Class in com.gcu
This controller processes login form submissions and interacts with the LoginService to validate credentials.
LoginController(LoginService) - Constructor for class com.gcu.LoginController
 
LoginForm - Class in com.gcu
Holds login form data.
LoginForm() - Constructor for class com.gcu.LoginForm
 
LoginService - Class in com.gcu
This service will validate user credentials by retrieving the user from the database and compare it to the store password.
LoginService(UsersDataService) - Constructor for class com.gcu.LoginService
 
logout(HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.LogoutController
This method invalidates the current HTTP session and redirects the user back to the login page.
LogoutController - Class in com.gcu
This controller invalidates the current HTTP session when a user logs out of the application.
LogoutController() - Constructor for class com.gcu.LogoutController
